rulings.Case Title: HUSSAM ABU-KHALAF VS. NANCY LOPEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 19, 2015 line 5. rulings.Case Title: BALWANTSINH THAKOR VS. THE INDUSTRY GROUP LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 19, 2015 line 6. PLAINTIFF BALWANTSINH THAKOR's Motion To Amend Judgment DENIED. Pursuant to the Order on Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment or Summary Adjudication regarding duty to Deliver Possession Plaintiff obtained a judgment for possession only. (See June 29, 2015 Order, page 2, paragraphs 1 and 4). Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that damages, after possession is no longer at issue, may be included in the judgment via a Motion to Amend Judgment. Also, Plaintiff failed to file a "motion" in violation of CRC 3.1112(a)(2). No grounds for the motion are listed in the Notice of Motion in violation of CRC 3.1110(a). Additionally, the notice of motion is titled "Notice of Plaintiff's Motion to Amend the Judgment" but the Points and Authorities are offered in "support of Motion for Reasonable Attorney's Fees." No motion for Reasonable Attorney's Fees on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZORIALL, LLC VS. DALE RICHARD DUNCAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 19, 2015 line 7. DEFENDANTS DALE DUNCAN and MARTA MENDOZA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED. Plaintiff's opposition is stricken. On August 5, 2015 Plaintiff obtained a Court order authorizing an extension of time to file an opposition (originally due on August 3, 2015) by no later than 4:00 p.m. on August 10, 2015. Plaintiff filed an untimely opposition at 1:55 p.m. on August 11, 2015. Plaintiff's memorandum in opposition is broken up into 2 documents: (1) 10-page "Introduction and Statement of Facts" and (2) 14-page "Opposition". "Introduction and Statement of Facts" is incorporated into the "Opposition" making Plaintiff's memorandum 24 pages long in violation of CRC 3.1113(d), (e), and (f). = (501/REQ)
